pr.title: Progress: bank two SI current-tree wins

summary: Small mechanical report-only follow-up to PR #16: banks 2 more active real-C SI (Serial Interface) functions in src/dolphin/si/SI.c that re-measure at 100% in the current tree but had stale report percentages. No source files changed.
decomp_lessons: Same stale-report pattern as PR #16: dolphin/si/SI.c had functions (fn_800D0CBC, fn_800D0DF8) already at 100% match in-tree that hadn't been banked into report.json yet, indicating these small banking sweeps are done per-unit/incrementally rather than as one giant catch-all pass.

key_files.role: Banked fn_800D0CBC and fn_800D0DF8 in src/dolphin/si/SI.c, bringing totals to 4,308/6,795 functions (~63.4%) and 542,148/1,368,604 code bytes (~39.6%).
Synced top-level progress table to match updated report.json numbers.
